data.title: Monolithic Architecture
data.description: Google traditionally employs a vast monolithic repository for code management.
data.technical_spec: Centralized code management with streamlined integration across systems.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Components are often broken down into microservices for scalability.
data.technical_spec: Small, independently deployable services handling specific tasks.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Google utilizes complex load balancing algorithms to manage traffic.
data.technical_spec: Algorithms like Maglev distribute network traffic effectively.

data.title: Serverless Frameworks
data.description: Transition towards serverless has been observed to increase efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Google Cloud Functions executes code without provisioning servers.

data.title: Borg
data.description: Internal cluster management system dealing with resource allocation.
data.technical_spec: Borg orchestrates scheduling of tasks on massive clusters.
